info.name: User Management Microservice
info.description:
GraphQL and gRPC endpoints for the User Management microservice.

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:3001/graphql`

**Auth:** After calling `login`, copy the `accessToken` from the response and set the collection variable `token`.

**gRPC:** Requests in the gRPC folder use Postman's native gRPC client. Import `src/proto/user.proto` when prompted.

variable.description: Paste the accessToken from the login response here

item.name: GraphQL
item.description: All GraphQL operations exposed at POST http://localhost:3001/graphql

request.description:
Public — Register a new user account.

Auto-saves `_id` to the `user_id` collection variable.

Public — Login with email/username and password.

Auto-saves `accessToken` to the `token` collection variable and `_id` to `user_id`.
Protected — Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

Protected — Returns a single user by their MongoDB `_id`.

Uses the `user_id` collection variable.
Protected — Updates the authenticated user's profile (firstName, lastName, bio, avatar).
Protected — Changes the authenticated user's password.
Protected — Soft-deletes the authenticated user's account.

item.name: gRPC
item.description:
gRPC methods defined in src/proto/user.proto.

**How to use in Postman:**
1. Create a new gRPC request.
2. Set the URL to `{{grpc_url}}` → `localhost:50051`.
3. Click "Import a .proto file" and select `user-management/src/proto/user.proto`.
4. Select the method from the dropdown and paste the message body below.

Note: gRPC requests cannot be stored as standard collection items in Postman v10. The entries below document the method name, proto package, and example request payloads for reference.

item.name: GetUser — get a single user by ID

header.value: Use Postman gRPC client: package=user, service=UserService, method=GetUser

request.description:
**gRPC — UserService.GetUser**

Proto package: `user`  
Service: `UserService`  
Method: `GetUser`  
Server URL: `localhost:50051`  
Proto file: `src/proto/user.proto`

**Request message:**
```json
{ "id": "<mongodb-object-id>" }
```

**Response message:**
```json
{
  "id": "...",
  "email": "alice@example.com",
  "username": "alice",
  "firstName": "Alice",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "avatar": "",
  "bio": "",
  "roles": ["user"],
  "isActive": true,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T09:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T09:00:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: GetUsersByIds — get multiple users by IDs

header.value: Use Postman gRPC client: package=user, service=UserService, method=GetUsersByIds

request.description:
**gRPC — UserService.GetUsersByIds**

Proto package: `user`  
Service: `UserService`  
Method: `GetUsersByIds`  
Server URL: `localhost:50051`  
Proto file: `src/proto/user.proto`

**Request message:**
```json
{ "ids": ["<id1>", "<id2>"] }
```

**Response message:**
```json
{
  "users": [
    { "id": "...", "email": "alice@example.com", ... },
    { "id": "...", "email": "bob@example.com",  ... }
  ]
}
```

header.value: Use Postman gRPC client: package=user, service=UserService, method=ValidateUser

request.description:
**gRPC — UserService.ValidateUser**

Proto package: `user`  
Service: `UserService`  
Method: `ValidateUser`  
Server URL: `localhost:50051`  
Proto file: `src/proto/user.proto`

Used by the API Gateway or Auth service to verify user credentials.

**Request message:**
```json
{ "email": "alice@example.com", "password": "Secret123!" }
```

**Response message (valid):**
```json
{
  "isValid": true,
  "user": { "id": "...", "email": "alice@example.com", ... }
}
```

**Response message (invalid):**
```json
{ "isValid": false, "user": null }
```
